metadata.source_authority: Colorado General Assembly, Second Regular Session, Seventy-fourth General Assembly
metadata.source_note: Companion source for C.R.S. 39-22-123.5(3.5)(a)(V) and 39-22-130(2)(b)(I): the official CRS title 39 HTM export replaces the estimated-adjustment-factor (CAGR) formula with a literal '[Insert 39-22-123.5(3.5)(a)(V) and 39-22-130(2)(b)(I).pdf here]' placeholder; the signed act carries the enacted formula text. Known extraction limitation: the PDF renders the CAGR equation as a typeset fraction with exponent; linear text extraction flattens it. The surrounding definitions (BV, EV, n, CAGR as estimated compound annual growth rate) are extracted faithfully and determine the formula.
metadata.title: HB 24-1134 (2024): Adjustments to Tax Expenditures to Reduce Burden — signed act

metadata.source_authority: Colorado General Assembly, Second Regular Session, Seventy-fourth General Assembly
metadata.source_note: Creates C.R.S. 39-22-130 (family affordability tax credit) including the 39-22-130(2)(b)(I) estimated-adjustment-factor formula that the CRS HTM export replaces with an insert placeholder. Same equation-layout extraction limitation as HB 24-1134: the typeset CAGR fraction/exponent flattens in linear text; the surrounding variable definitions extract faithfully and determine the formula.
metadata.title: HB 24-1311 (2024): Family Affordability Tax Credit — signed act
